topic.description: Topic name in the target language

word.description: The word in the target language

word_id.description: Unique stable identifier for this word, used for cross-referencing. Format: [lang]_[pos]_[word_normalised], e.g. 'el_verb_γράφω'. Once set, never change it.

definition.description: A short definition of the word, written entirely in the target language using only vocabulary appropriate for the stated CEFR level. Mandatory on every entry. No translation.

synonyms.description: Words with similar meaning — all in the target language

antonyms.description: Words with opposite meaning — all in the target language

grammar_refs.description: Links to grammar groups that govern this word's forms. Prevents duplication — the grammar file is the single source of truth for paradigms.

layer.description: Grammar layer: morphology, syntax, phonology, particles

category.description: Grammar category file: verbs, nouns, adjectives, etc.

group_id.description: The id field of the grammar group this word belongs to
